title: Spicy Creamy Adventurous Ethiopian Beef Stir-fry
description: A spicy and creamy dish infused with the flavor of Ethiopian cuisine featuring raspberry jam for a touch of sweetness without added sugar.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chili powder, cumin seeds, ground cinnamon, turmeric powder, and black pepper. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add finely chopped garlic and onion; sauté until onions are translucent, about 3 minutes.
Increase heat to high, then add diced red bell pepper. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until peppers are slightly softened.
Season beef with lemon juice, salt (optional), and chili powder. Add beef to the skillet; cook until browned on all sides.
Pour in raspberry jam. Stir well to combine all ingredients together. Reduce heat to medium-low and let simmer for about 5 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Remove from heat and serve hot with injera bread (optional).
Enjoy your spicy and creamy Ethiopian beef stir-fry as a delicious dinner option.
